news.t: The 9 Best Inflation-Proof Investments for Your Portfolio
10 Best Inflation-Fighting ETFs for Higher Costs

holdings.infoBox: FCPI is an equity ETF with a total of 105 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 6.21%, Apple at 5.45%, Microsoft at 3.64%, APA Corporation at 3.18%, and Newmont at 3.16%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Stocks for Inflation ETF (FCPI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of U.S. large- and mid-cap stocks based on multi-factor criteria with structural tilts towards inflation-sensitive sectors and industries FCPI was launched on Nov 5, 2019 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: The second-half playbook for ETFs: Will investors return to stock-based ETFs?
data.text: Todd Sohn, Strategas Securities, joins CNBC's Bob Pisani to discuss the lack of investor enthusiasm for stock-based ETFs, and how investors can prepare for the second half of 2023.

data.title: The 9 Best Inflation-Proof Investments for Your Portfolio
data.text: These stocks and ETFs are some of the best inflation-proof investments and could continue to shine as price growth cools.
